primarySource.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
primarySource.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

sources.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
sources.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

sources.label: Vegas Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

decklistSource.label: Ahri official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

secondaryDeckSources.label: Ahri Riftbound.gg best-of deck
secondaryDeckSources.description: Trusted Riftbound.gg Best of Legend deck reference preserved as a secondary source.

resolvedCard.name: Azir - Ascendant
resolvedCard.effect: :rb_rune_calm:: [Action] — Choose a unit you control. Move me to its location and it to my original location. If it's equipped, you may attach one of its Equipment to me. Use only once per turn.

resolvedCard.name: Janna - Savior
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)
When you play me, heal your units here, then move up to one enemy unit from here to its base.

resolvedCard.name: Ravenbloom Student
resolvedCard.effect: When you play a spell, give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Sona - Harmonious
resolvedCard.effect: At the end of your turn, if I'm at a battlefield, ready up to 4 friendly runes.

resolvedCard.name: Stalwart Poro
resolvedCard.effect: [Shield] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm a defender.)

resolvedCard.name: Stellacorn Herder
resolvedCard.effect: When I move, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Sunlit Guardian
resolvedCard.effect:
[Shield] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm a defender.)
[Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)

resolvedCard.name: Thousand-Tailed Watcher
resolvedCard.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When you play me, give enemy units -3 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

resolvedCard.name: Charm
resolvedCard.effect: Move an enemy unit.

resolvedCard.name: Defy
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

resolvedCard.name: Discipline
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: En Garde
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit +1 :rb_might: this turn, then an additional +1 :rb_might: this turn if it is the only unit you control there.

resolvedCard.name: Not So Fast
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

resolvedCard.name: Singularity
resolvedCard.effect: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

resolvedCard.name: Thwonk!
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Stun an attacking unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

resolvedCard.name: Brutalizer
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] :rb_rune_calm: (:rb_rune_calm:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Cloth Armor
resolvedCard.effect:
[Quick-Draw] (This has [Reaction]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
[Equip] :rb_rune_mind: (:rb_rune_mind:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Sterak's Gage
resolvedCard.effect:
[Quick-Draw] (This has [Reaction]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
[Equip] :rb_rune_calm: (:rb_rune_calm:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Zhonya's Hourglass
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
If a friendly unit would die, kill this instead. Heal that unit, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)

resolvedCard.name: Forge of the Fluft
resolvedCard.effect: While you control this battlefield, friendly legends have ":rb_exhaust:: Attach an Equipment you control to a unit you control."

resolvedCard.name: The Papertree
resolvedCard.effect: When you hold here, each player channels 1 rune exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Vilemaw's Lair
resolvedCard.effect: Units can't move from here to base.

resolvedCard.name: Adaptatron
resolvedCard.effect: When I conquer, you may kill a gear. If you do, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

resolvedCard.name: Ahri - Alluring
resolvedCard.effect: When I hold, you score 1 point.

resolvedCard.name: Bellows Breath
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 1 to up to three units at the same location.

resolvedCard.name: Blitzcrank - Impassive
resolvedCard.effect:
[Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
When you play me to a battlefield, you may move an enemy unit to here.
When I hold, return me to my owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Not So Fast
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

resolvedCard.name: Thwonk!
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Stun an attacking unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

resolvedCard.name: Wind Wall
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell.
